steps.t: Indagir asks you for your aid in delving into Thaurisgar, the Vile Apothecary. You should speak to Indagir if you wish to help him. Indagir can be fou…
Indagir has asked you to find him within Thaurisgar, the Vile Apothecary. <rgb=#FF0000>Use the Instance Finder to enter Thaurisgar, the Vile Apo…
Indagir has asked you to clear a path before you can delve any further into the apothecary. Find your way to the lower level.
You have found your way to the lower level apothecaries. But Indagir is nowhere to be found. You should clear the path ahead and find Indagir.
The gate has opened. You should explore the main hall of the apothecary and try to find Indagir.
You have found Indagir in the main hall of Thaurisgar. But it looks like the most twisted experiments block his path.
You have defeated the Twins, but it seems Indagir was just using you to get what he wanted.
Torvendor witnessed Indagir's betrayal. He was suspicious of him from the start. You should speak to Torvendor. Torvendor can be found in Bail Avarc o…
